narrative:
Sidney City has 12,747 registered voters, with 63.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
